apa.description: Asveora Profile Address (APA). Used as the address prefix in AUID format: [APA]=[PIK]-[VSIG]. MUST resolve to a CIR-backed identity.

cir_reference.description: CIR identifier that this APA resolves to. REQUIRED for deterministic identity resolution. MUST be registry-backed.

scope.description: Optional namespace scope for partitioned identity domains (e.g., subdomain ownership boundaries). Non-authoritative.

metadata.description: Non-authoritative metadata. MUST NOT affect identity resolution, registry state, RBAC, federation, or exposure decisions.
